_meta.description: Sample data for the Create wizard flow

song.title: The Memory
song.prompt: Describe the ONE specific memory you want to capture
song.placeholder: That time we stayed up all night talking about life on our road trip to the coast...
song.helpText: Be specific! The more detail, the more personal the song.

song.title: Tell me more
song.prompt: Answer a few questions to make it even more personal

song.title: Special words
song.prompt: Any nicknames, inside jokes, or special phrases?
song.placeholder: She always says 'love you to the moon'...
song.helpText: These make the song uniquely yours

song.title: What makes them special?
song.prompt: What do you love most about this person?
song.placeholder: The way she always knows when I need a hug...

song.title: Review & Style
song.prompt: Confirm your details and choose a music style

poem.title: Your message
poem.prompt: What do you want to express?
poem.placeholder: I want to tell her how grateful I am for always being there...

poem.title: Tell me more
poem.prompt: A few questions to deepen the poem

birthday: What's your favorite memory from a birthday you spent with {name}?
How would you describe {name}'s personality in three words?
What's something {name} always says or does that makes you smile?
anniversary: What moment from your relationship still gives you butterflies?
What's something small that {name} does that shows they love you?
Where do you see your journey together in the next chapter?
thank_you: What specific thing did {name} do that meant the most to you?
How has {name} changed your life or perspective?
What would you want {name} to know that you've never said?
apology: What happened that you wish you could take back?
What did you learn about yourself from this situation?
What do you hope for your relationship with {name} going forward?
encouragement: What strength have you seen in {name} that they might not see?
What would you want {name} to remember during hard times?

sampleCreation.memory: The time you stayed up all night with me when I was sick, singing lullabies and making me feel safe even though I know you were exhausted.
aiAnswers: She has the warmest laugh that makes everyone in the room smile
She always puts her hand on my forehead when she's worried about me
We went through her cancer treatment together and she never lost her hope
sampleCreation.nicknames: Mama Bear, 'love you to the moon and back'
sampleCreation.whatMakesSpecial: Her unconditional love and the way she always believes in me even when I don't believe in myself
